description: Bifolio of accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. A jeweler notes jewelry brought, polished and repaired, and sold. Goitein notes, "important for study of profit." Mentions people such as Sulaymān; Tamīm; Abū l-Ḥasan al-Mūrid; al-Muqrī(?); al-ʿAjamī; and al-Munādī. Mentions a partnership (sharika) and numerous specific items, including something called בשכאס. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
